description_long: This is a rectangular medicine box with a predominantly white exterior, decorated with playful geometric shapes in red, yellow, and blue. The front face features a stylized illustration of a matryoshka doll, the brand name 'Mamyska', and product information in Spanish, including weight and contents. The sides of the box display additional information in multiple languages, including Russian, English, and Spanish, as well as manufacturing details and a recycling symbol. The top of the box is blue with a large yellow heart, adding a cheerful and distinctive touch. The box appears to be made of lightweight cardboard, suitable for containing small medicine items or wooden toys, as indicated by the text.
description: A white rectangular medicine box with colorful geometric designs, a matryoshka doll illustration, and multilingual product information. The box features a blue top with a yellow heart and is made of cardboard.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the box with a large red circle, a blue recycling symbol, and the website 'Mamyska.com' near the top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the matryoshka doll illustration, the brand name 'Mamyska', product weight, and contents in Spanish, along with a yellow geometric shape at the bottom.
description_view_2: This side features manufacturing information, 'MADE IN RUSSIA', and a large yellow circle and red geometric shape.
description_view_3: This view shows multilingual product descriptions in Russian, English, and Spanish, with a red triangle and yellow circle as decorative elements.
attribute_label_text: 45 gr 7 piezas Mamyska Te quiere Madera de Tilo Decorados a mano Mamyska.com MADE IN RUSSIA [illegible] English Mamyska, the Russian meaning, is the prototype of the loved children’s toy, the wooden matryoshka doll, and the name chosen to represent this set of hand-painted wooden figures that make Russian homes happy. Español Mamyska, la muñeca rusa, es la inspiración de este juego de piezas de madera pintadas a mano que llenan de alegría los hogares rusos.
attribute_brand_logo: stylized matryoshka doll in red, blue, and yellow
